channel.title: actions on Ahmad Jamali
channel.description: Recent content in actions on Ahmad Jamali

item.title: How Did I Build My Blog With Hugo Github Pages and Github Actions
item.description: How did I build my blog with Hugo, Github Pages, and Github Actions For a while I was looking to start a blog and share my thoughts and experiences on different topics, mainly technology and homelabbing, but I kept putting it aside because just the thought of setting up a VPS and then installing Wordpress, database, etc. was daunting. Hello Hugo! I started to look into another way of achieving this and I came across Hugo.
